title: San Millán 80/20 Session
description: 80% Z2 + 20% hard finish — San Millán's personal protocol
purpose: Aerobic base with high-intensity finish for time-efficient fitness

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0: 70% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2. Boring? Maybe. Effective? Absolutely. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Zone 2: where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your future self will thank you for these base miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This should hurt just enough to make you question your sanity. You're doing it right.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold effort at 100% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Threshold work is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace the grind.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your lactate threshold called. It's not happy about what you're doing to it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 100% FTP. This should feel challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/4. Your legs are screaming. Good. That means it's working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/4 — hold 115% FTP at 90-105 rpm. Seated. 180s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3 of 4 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 1 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. This is where you prove you're serious. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block. Hold power steady. 0s rest coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain' (it doesn't, but it should).
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. Give it everything. Cooldown is coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.
